Item Name: Yogi Raspberry Leaf Tea - Organic Raspberry Leaf Tea Supports Reproductive Health - Organic Tea Bags - Caffeine Free - 16 Tea Bags Per Pack (6 Packs) Bullet Point 1: Yogi Raspberry Leaf Tea: A comforting and earthy herbal tea designed to support female health and wellness at every stage. Bullet Point 2: Organic Ingredients: Crafted with USDA organic, non-GMO raspberry leaves to ensure a pure and natural tea experience. Bullet Point 3: Raspberry Leaf Tea Bags: Each box includes 16 microplastic-free, compostable tea bags for convenient and eco-friendly brewing. Bullet Point 4: Health Benefits: Supports hormone balance, menstrual cramps, and reproductive wellness in women. Bullet Point 5: Uniquely Yogi: We believe in using the highest quality spices and botanicals, complementing them with intriguing, delightful flavors, qualities that make all of our teas uniquely Yogi. Product Description: Raspberry Leaf Tea is a pleasant, earthy-sweet herbal tea. Raspberry Leaf, a traditional ingredient prized by midwives and herbalists during pregnancy, is known for aiding the discomfort of menstruation and supporting the uterus. Drinking Raspberry Leaf tea can be comforting during your moon cycle and a supportive companion at all stages of life. So brew a Raspberry Leaf tea bag and drink a cup of our tea today to experience the difference that quality and care can make.

At Yogi, we believe the purpose of business is to serve. Yogi was founded on this belief and still uses the idea of using business to serve as its guiding principle: Feel Good, Be Good, Do Good. For us, this means more than just creating deliciously purposeful herbal tea blends. With every ingredient we source, and every cup of tea we make, we strive to support quality, sustainability, and social responsibility on a local, national and global level.

For over five decades, we’ve been making delicious, functional teas inspired by the ancient holistic healing philosophy of Ayurveda. Our diverse tea selection supports everyday well-being with specialized herbal formulas thoughtfully blended for both health benefits and appealing flavor.

Yogi is a Certified B Corporation producing more than 40 tea blends from over 100 organic spices and botanicals sourced from around the globe. With every ingredient we source, and every tea bag we make, we strive to support environmental sustainability and social responsibility. We do so by following highly selective sourcing standards, performing rigorous quality tests, mandating environmentally sound farming practices, and partnering with local communities. Through such partnerships, we want to empower our entire tea ecosystem to live healthy, vibrant lives. It is our hope that our commitment to goodness shines through in every cup of Yogi tea. Value: 96.0 Unit: Count
overall_summary: Premium organic herbal tea positioned for female health and wellness. Certified organic and non-GMO with eco-friendly tea bags. Bundle deal of 6 packs offers value per unit. Brand emphasizes quality, sustainability, and social responsibility.

This Mix is perfect for Vegan, Keto, and Paleo diets. Bullet Point 2: ✔️ HIGHLY NUTRITIOUS: This blend is packed with dietary fiber, protein, good fats, Vitamins E, A, B6, and essential minerals like Magnesium, Phosphorus, Copper, Manganese, Zinc, and Iron. Bullet Point 3: ✔️ OVEN-ROASTED WITH NO OIL ADDED, LIGHTLY SALTED: Four Nuts Mix by Food to Live is gently roasted in an oven without adding oil, and lightly salted with Himalayan Pink Salt which has lower sodium levels in comparison to regular white salt. Bullet Point 4: ✔️ WHOLESOME & FILLING SNACK: Four Nuts Mix is a perfect grab-n-go snack that will keep you full throughout the day. Take it to work, on a hike, road trip, plane, walk, or school. It is also a great substitute for high-calorie potato chips or popcorn. Bullet Point 5: ✔️ VERSATILE INGREDIENT: This Nut Mix can be added to salads, smoothies, oatmeal, and granola. They can also be sprinkled over pasta, avocado toasts, ice cream, and a variety of desserts with caramel. Besides, Four Nuts Mix is great for baking breads, cookies, cakes, and muffins. Product Description: We are happy to present our Four Nuts Mix which takes an honorable place in Food to Live Signature Snacks Collection. It includes 4 nutrient-dense nut varieties that are in fact our best-sellers: Almonds, Cashews, Pecans, and Pistachios. This Mix is gently roasted in the oven without using oil, and is lightly seasoned with Himalayan Pink Salt, which has a lower sodium content than table salt and is higher in minerals.

Roasted and Salted Four Nuts Mix Uses

Mixed Nuts Lightly Salted have an incredible intense flavor. The crispiness of Pistachios and Pecans is complimented by the creamy flavor of Cashews and sweet notes of Almonds. Mixed Nuts individual packs are perfect for snacking on the go. Grab them on a hike, plane, road trip, school, and to work. Apart from that, mixed nuts can be crashed and sprinkled over ice cream, desserts, smoothies, toasts, eggs, salads, and pasta. Furthermore, try adding mixed nuts salted to your baked goodies, for example pies, cakes, breads, cookies, and muffins – not only will they add an exquisite flavor, but they will also boost it with nutrition.

Four Nuts Mix Nutritional Profile

Four Nut Mix by Food to Live consists of highly nutritious nuts that will significantly enrich your diet. Almonds are an amazing source of Vitamin E, Cashews are loaded with potent antioxidants (namely polyphenols), Pistachios are a powerhouse of Vitamin B6, and Pecans contain good amounts of Calcium, Magnesium, and Potassium. Besides, they are low in carbs which makes them suitable for Keto and Paleo diets. What’s great is that roasted mixed nuts have almost the same nutritional profile as raw ones, so you won’t lose on nutrients when eating them.

Storage Tips

Store Mix Nuts in a tightly closed container and in a cool dry area. If you want to purchase mixed nuts bulk bags for long-term usage, it’s better to keep them in a fridge or a freezer. Value: 256.0 Unit: Ounce
